description: Enterprise Provisioning: Assigning specialized SDLC roles to the 3-Agent Crew.

assign_mistral_as_developer.input: Generate a Standardized TDD Engine. The script must implement a CLI interface (sys.argv) to accept a phase and a payload. It must include a Mechanical Logic Factory that dynamically generates Python code based on the payload while adhering to the TDD phase (Red/Green/Refactor). The output must be valid, executable Python code with a shebang and standard error handling.

assign_amazon_as_qa.input: Generate a QA Engineer Agent capable of syntax auditing.

assign_gemini_as_documentarian.input: Generate a Documentation Agent capable of technical synthesis.
